strategy: This is a Raid fight, so coordinate roles and use the free inspired casts (Brush Fire, Levin Bruin, Rotting Fomori, War Oracle) as your no-cost setup and damage.
It resists Storm and Life 100%, Fire, Death, Balance and the astral and shadow schools 70%, and Ice and Myth 40%, so hit with Ice or Myth and never into Storm or Life.
It buffs itself with Power Current every Round, so do not stall; build blades on your hitter and end the fight before its charge snowballs.
After it casts Doom Oni it shields with Energy Wall, so break that wall or pierce through before your finisher.
cheatNotes: You get inspired casts of Brush Fire, Levin Bruin, Rotting Fomori, and War Oracle during this fight; use them, since they cost you nothing.
At the end of every Round it casts Power Current on itself, steadily building a charge.
After it casts Doom Oni it puts up an Energy Wall on itself.
